Aaannnyyways… I developed a hyperfixation on her already. She’s really cute and cool and I feel SO bad for her. I only have 61% research on her as of now since I’ve been focusing more on drawing & obsessing over her rather than actually playing… I’ll grind once I’m done making this bot trust!!

Also she’s trans :3 sorry if the bot like forgets that… but some of her self-worth issues come from her being trans so ya it’s important!!

Idk if I’m good at making angst bots help??? Lmk if this is like bad
